title: Cassia quarrei
taxonomy: Cassia quarrei is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Cassia, which is a part of the subfamily Cercidoideae. Further, Cassia quarrei can be placed in the tribe Cercideae, which is a group of flowering plants characterized by their legume fruits. This species is native to parts of Asia and is often found in dry, open areas. Cassia quarrei is often used in traditional medicine due to its potential health benefits.
